_comment: Authored by Claude. Daemon reads this on every loop. Update whenever thesis changes — daemon picks up within one tick. No numeric cap on alert count — every alert must be actively useful NOW (would you act on it with real money if it fires in the next hour?). Stale = remove. Signal-only / REMOTE / low-probability = remove.
pruned_by: 10:55 UTC tick — 68 unconsumed events (3 OIL level_cross 90.5 cross_down retests, 20 bar_close 22:23-23:25 full universe, 45 news_flash). DEADLINE PASSED (literal 0000 GMT Wed Apr 22 was ~10h45m ago). NEW INTEL: Indian Express Apr 22 06:41 GMT 'ceasefire extended' (Trump tone shifted to '48-hour warning'), The Quint Apr 22 06:37 GMT 'Vance Islamabad trip ON HOLD as Iran says NO to talks', BreakingNews.ie Apr 22 08:37 'Ships attacked in Strait of Hormuz amid efforts to re-start peace talks'. NET: extension granted with friction — Iran rejected Vance, ship attacks ongoing, Trump verbal escalation. Tape: OIL 90.069 (-0.07% NET, day range 87.455-91.177 645p swing settled near 90 psych), GOLD 4757 (+0.79% safe-haven bid persists), USDJPY 159.247 (-0.06% USD bid faded), AUDUSD 0.71609 (+0.12% stable), BTCUSD 78,100 (+3.14% strong risk-on), USDCAD/EURUSD/GBPUSD/USDCHF quiet. DIVERGENCE: BTC+AUD say risk-on, GOLD says safe-haven hedge, OIL flat — market split on extension durability. 3 OIL level_cross all SKIP per alert's own conditions (gold reversed UP +0.79% = explicit SKIP trigger; ceasefire-extended headlines support deal-priced-out). 20 bar_close all SKIP (modest drift since 23:25, no clean structure shift). REMOVE oil_crude_retest_90_buy (gold reverse SKIP fired + extension headlines invalidate buy thesis + already crossed 3x without rejection wick). MODIFY audusd + usdjpy notes (refresh prices, deadline-passed framing). ADD gold_safehaven_continuation_buy at 4775 (above day high 4772.24, would confirm Iran-talks-collapse hedging, +Vance walkout headlines support). 9 structure_watch KEEP. 8 queries: TUNE iran_ceasefire note (deadline passed, extension+friction state), 7 KEEP.

level_alerts.note: buy AUDUSD 0.707 support on ceasefire-fail spike — live 10:51 UTC 0.71609 (+10p vs prior 0.71628 yesterday, 90.9p above zone, stable). DEADLINE PASSED (literal 0000 GMT Wed Apr 22 was ~10h45m ago). State: extension reportedly granted (Indian Express) but friction — Vance Islamabad trip ON HOLD, Iran rejected talks (The Quint Apr 22 06:37 GMT), ship attacks Hormuz Apr 22 08:37 (BreakingNews.ie). USD safe-haven bid faded (BTC +3.14%, USDJPY -0.06%). For AUD to spike to 0.707 requires fresh decisive Iran-collapse catalyst (unsigned extension breakdown + retaliation strike). Wait for rejection wick on 0.707 touch; skip naked breaks. SL 0.703, TP 0.7187 (Fri high) on confirmation.
level_alerts.proximity: 90.9p above 0.707 buy zone (live 10:51 UTC 0.71609 bid). Stable; deadline-extension-with-friction state, USD bid faded — needs decisive Iran-collapse for spike to zone.

level_alerts.note: sell USDJPY 160.00 intervention red-line fade — live 10:51 UTC 159.247 bid (-33p vs 22:44 UTC 159.583, day range 159.101-159.455, 75.3p below 160). USD safe-haven bid faded post-deadline (BTC +3.14%, broad USD pairs soft). Day high 159.455 LOWER than yesterday's 159.633 — pressure off zone. Setup still valid as red-line fade (Japan intervened 159.23 Jan 2026, MoF Katayama G7 'high urgency' verbal, BoJ Apr 27-28 priced hold) but probability of touching 160 reduced unless USD bid returns on fresh Iran-escalation. Short ONLY on rejection wick at 160.00; skip naked breaks. SL 160.50, TP 158.50 R:R ~3:1.
level_alerts.proximity: 75.3p below 160.00 intervention red line (live 10:51 UTC 159.247 bid). Day high 159.455 vs yesterday 159.633 — pressure off, USD bid faded post-deadline.

level_alerts.note: ADDED 10:55 UTC — buy GOLD 4775 breakout (above day high 4772.24) on confirmed Iran-talks-collapse hedging continuation. Live 10:51 UTC 4757 bid (+0.79% day, day range 4715.44-4772.24). Catalysts armed: Vance Islamabad trip ON HOLD + Iran 'no' to talks (The Quint Apr 22) + ship attacks Hormuz Apr 22 (BreakingNews.ie) + Trump '48-hour warning' tone shift. Gold rebounded strongly DESPITE oil flat = genuine safe-haven hedge bid persisting through deadline-extension ambiguity. Buy on M15 close >4775 with bullish FVG + headline-confirm of fresh Iran-escalation (retaliation strike, formal walkout). SL 4730 (below 4715 day low + 15p), TP1 4810 (post 22:23 H4 close-ref), TP2 4850. Conv 3 (catalyst-conditional). SKIP if BTC continues +3% rally AND USD pairs bid (would imply pure risk-on = gold sells off).
level_alerts.proximity: 18p below 4775 buy trigger (live 10:51 UTC 4757 bid). 4.7p below day high 4772.24 — close to zone, needs catalyst push.
